languages.text: {n}Новый приступ боли скручивает преступника. Из-под стыка черепа и импланта толчком выплескивается новая порция розовой слизи.{/n} "Не надо..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Новый приступ боли скручивает предступника. Из-под стыка черепа и импланта толчком выплескивается новая порция розовой слизи.{/n} "Не надо..."

languages.text: {n}Another wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the seam between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."
languages.original_text: {n}Новый приступ боли скручивает преступника. Из-под стыка черепа и импланта толчком выплескивается новая порция розовой слизи.{/n} "Не надо..."

traits.locale_text: {n}A new wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh spurt of pink mucus shoots out from the junction between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."

{n}Another wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the seam between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."

languages.text: {n}Eine weitere Welle aus Schmerz überwältigt den Kriminellen. Rosafarbener Schleim sickert aus der Fuge zwischen seinem Schädel und dem Implantat.{/n} "Nicht ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Another wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the seam between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine weitere Welle aus Schmerz überwältigt den Kriminellen. Rosafarbener Schleim sickert aus der Fuge zwischen seinem Schädel und dem Implantat.{/n} "Nicht ..."

languages.text: {n}Le criminel est submergé par une nouvelle vague de douleur. Une goutte de mucus rose jaillit de la jonction entre son crâne et l'implant.{/n} « Ne... »
languages.original_text: {n}Another wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the seam between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le criminel est submergé par une nouvelle vague de douleur. Une goutte de mucus rose jaillit de la jonction entre son crâne et l'implant.{/n} « Ne... »

languages.text: {n}又一阵剧痛冲垮了罪犯。一团新鲜的粉色粘液从他头骨与植入物的接缝处喷涌而出。{/n}“别……”
languages.original_text: {n}Another wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the seam between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."

traits.locale_text: {n}又一阵剧痛冲垮了罪犯。一团新鲜的粉色粘液从他头骨与植入物的接缝处喷涌而出。{/n}“别……”

languages.text: {n}Otra oleada de dolor abruma al criminal. Un glóbulo de moco rosado brota de la fisura que hay entre su cráneo y el implante.{/n} «No...».
languages.original_text: {n}Another wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the seam between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Otra oleada de dolor abruma al criminal. Un glóbulo de moco rosado brota de la fisura que hay entre su cráneo y el implante.{/n} «No...».

languages.text: {n}新たな痛みの波が犯人を圧倒する。頭蓋骨とインプラントの接合部からピンク色の粘液が噴き出す。{/n}"やめて..."
languages.original_text: {n}A new wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh spurt of pink mucus shoots out from the junction between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."

languages.text: {n}Suçluyu bir acı dalgası daha bunaltıyor. Kafatası ile implant arasındaki dikişten yeni bir damla pembe mukus fışkırıyor.{/n} "Yapmayın..."
languages.original_text: {n}Another wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the seam between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."
